author: nottherealtar
install_msg: Try `/brb` for help. Set with `15`, `1h`, `at 3:30pm`; clear with `back`. Admins: `/brbzone America/New_York` for clock times. Ping replies need the bot to see message content in servers.
name: cooldownbuddy
short: BRB/lurk timer, ping deflection, bean proverbs
description: Hybrid /brb with minutes, Xm, Xh, XhYm, at/until HH:MM (guild TZ via /brbzone). Mentions while away get dismissive proverbs; back or timer posts a return proverb in the set channel.
end_user_data_statement: Stores per-member BRB until timestamp and channel ID per guild, and guild IANA timezone for parsing clock times.
